title: PluginManifest
description: Manifest shipped alongside an out-of-tree pipeline plugin. Loaded and verified by src/pipeline/pluginLoader.ts before the plugin module is imported.

schemaVersion.description: Manifest schema version. Bump when breaking the on-disk shape.

id.description: Plugin id, used as the trust whitelist key. Stable across versions.

kind.description: What surface this plugin contributes — a pipeline stage definition, a provider plugin, or a swappable service implementation.

entry.description: Path to the plugin entry module relative to the manifest. Must not escape the plugin directory.

aiVideo.description: Compatible host version range (npm semver range syntax).

permissions.description: Capabilities the plugin requests from PipelineServices and the host environment. Loader uses this to decide which services to inject (or refuse to load if a permission is denied).

stages.description: If kind=stage, the list of stage names this plugin registers.

providers.description: If kind=provider, the list of provider plugin ids this entry registers.

value.description: Hex-encoded 64-byte ed25519 signature over the canonical JSON manifest body (excluding the signature field).

signature.description: Optional ed25519 signature. Required when the plugin is loaded under strict mode or when the host's trusted-plugins.json demands it.

metadata.description: Free-form metadata bag for plugin-specific extensions.
